title: Question for the medical professionals
body: So I was thinking about what's actually in vape juice and there's saline in it, so that got me wondering would it be possible, to ina way flush someone's lungs with a heated saline solution that's made to help dissolve it better and it can be easily rinsed out with water And dried with a medical hair dryer 🤣 that doesn't have a heat function, since the structure of a lung under a microscope is sponge like I think that might work and that might be what popcorn lung is a crystallization of the chemicals in the lungs and that's why it hurts? Also that's how snots produced in the body right the lungs slowly works all the gunk out?
